name: Glucosamine
summary: Decision-ready summary: Glucosamine is best framed for knee osteoarthritis symptom support; long-term joint comfort; safety screen: shellfish allergy; warfarin; diabetes medication review.
description: Glucosamine is used for joint support with moderate overall confidence for osteoarthritis outcomes; mechanism plausibility includes cartilage matrix influences.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v9.7: Glucosamine has mixed OA evidence; use conservative symptom-support language.
claimMap.notes: v9.7: Glucosamine has mixed OA evidence; use conservative symptom-support language.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 1500 mg/day glucosamine sulfate is the most common clinical dose
